product: SQL alert task in Lakeflow Jobs is now generally available ​
tagline: June 29, 2026 The SQL alert task in Lakeflow Jobs is now generally available.
what_it_does: June 29, 2026 The SQL alert task in Lakeflow Jobs is now generally available. Use the task to evaluate a Databricks SQL alert as part of a Lakeflow Job.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
